name: panpour
flavor_texts: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.
It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail.
The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail.
text: Panpour is the Spray Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: gluttony, torrent (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 53, Defense: 48, Sp. Atk: 53, Sp. Def: 48, Speed: 64. Evolution line: panpour → simipour. Lore: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large. It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail. The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail.
